name: compact-fallback-rescue
description: Session-scoped Codex compact failure rescue. When enabled for one conversation, a local watcher can resume that session with gpt-5.4-mini after a remote compact failure, then switch back to the original model.

interface.shortDescription: Rescue selected sessions after remote compact failures
interface.longDescription: Adds a local session-scoped watcher and commands for rescuing selected Codex conversations after remote compact failures. It does not change the global provider or hide existing history.
defaultPrompt: Enable compact fallback rescue for this chat
